projects.name: Text-to-Image using Diffusion
projects.description: Trained a diffusion model with UNet, VAE, and CLIP embeddings for high-quality image generation. Optimized training on AWS SageMaker with spot instances, reducing costs by 68%.

projects.name: Text Summarization GPT
projects.description: Pretrained a 125M-parameter transformer for summarization. Fine-tuned on XSum dataset, achieving a 5.4 ROUGE score.

projects.name: Image Depth Map Prediction
projects.description: Developed a depth estimation model using Vision Transformer, achieving 19 cm RMSE and 15% improvement in complex environments.

projects.name: Automated Stock Price Prediction System
projects.description: Built a CNN-based stock price prediction model with XGBoost for feature selection, improving accuracy and reproducibility.

projects.name: Lane Segmentation
projects.description: Developed a U-Net model for lane detection in autonomous vehicles, achieving 80% IoU and integrated into a Flask app for real-time use.

projects.name: Motor Self Inspection
projects.description: A web app that detects vehicle damages for faster insurance claim approvals.

projects.name: Image Denoising
projects.description: Used an autoencoder neural network for effective image denoising.

description: Developed ML pipelines for block trade allocation and time series forecasting, improving operational efficiency by 15%, reducing risk, and enhancing cash flow. Validated model optimizations through A/B testing.
Automated post-trade data cleaning and matching with XGBoost, reducing manual workload by 30%, improving accuracy, and speeding up execution.
Enhanced alignment between live and simulated trading environments by 50%, analyzing gigabytes of stock data with Matplotlib and pandas to refine testing and strategies.
Optimized trading model data access by 75% using PostgreSQL, SQL, and Python to automate workflows and accelerate the ML lifecycle.
Achieved 90% IoU in car damage detection by implementing a Mask R-CNN model in TensorFlow and OpenCV, significantly reducing manual effort in damage assessment.
Increased claim approval efficiency by 60% through a Django web platform, reducing approval time and labor costs.
